zh.lifeSummary: 當Constance Blount於大約1380年出生在英國德比夏爾巴頓 布朗特時，她的父親Walter Blount31歲，母親Sancha de Ayala21歲。她於1401年12月16日之前與Sir John Sutton V結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1432年9月23日在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年53歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Constance Blount于大约1380年出生在英国德比夏爾巴頓 布朗特时，她的父亲Walter Blount31岁，母亲Sancha de Ayala21岁。她于1401年12月16日之前与Sir John Sutton V结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1432年9月23日在英国諾薩普頓史爾享年53岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾諾薩普頓。

nameMeanings.name: Blount
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Blunt
meanings: English: nickname for someone with fair hair or a light complexion, from Old French blund, blond (from Latin blondus) ‘blond, fair, yellow-haired’, used also of complexion.

nameMeanings.name: Constance
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval form of the Late Latin name Constantia, which is either a feminine derivative of Constans ( see Constant ) or an abstract noun meaning ‘constancy’. This was a popular name among the Normans, and was borne by, amongst others, the formidable Constance of Sicily ( 1158–98 ), wife of the Emperor Henry VI .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Constance Blount was born about 1380, in Barton Blount, Derbyshire, England, her father, Walter Blount, was 31 and her mother, Sancha de Ayala, was 21. She married Sir John Sutton V before 16 December 1401. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 23 September 1432, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England.

fr.Dudley Castle, Dudley, West Midlands, En: Dudley Castle, Dudley, West Midlands, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Constance Blount est née environ 1380, à Barton Blount, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Walter Blount, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Sancha de Ayala, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Sutton V avant 16 décembre 1401. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 septembre 1432, à Northamptonshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Northampton, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

de.Dudley Castle, Dudley, West Midlands, En: Dudley Castle, Dudley, West Midlands, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Constance Blount um 1380 in Barton Blount, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Walter Blount 31 und ihre Mutter Sancha de Ayala 21. Sie hat vor 16. Dezember 1401 Sir John Sutton V geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. September 1432 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Northamptonshire, England und wurde in Northampton, Northamptonshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Blount è nata il circa 1380 nel Barton Blount, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Walter Blount, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Sancha de Ayala, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Sutton V prima del 16 dicembre 1401. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 23 settembre 1432, nel Northamptonshire, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolta a Northampton, Northamptonshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Constance Blountが約1380年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアバートン ブロウントで生まれた時，父Walter Blountは31歳，母Sancha de Ayalaは21歳であった。1401年12月16日以前にSir John Sutton Vと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1432年9月23日にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアで53歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアノーサンプトンにて埋葬された。

ko.Dudley Castle, Dudley, West Midlands, En: 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 미들랜드즈 드들리 드들리 카스틀
ko.lifeSummary: Constance Blount(이)가 대략 1380년 영국 더비실르 바턴 블루트에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Walter Blount(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sancha de Ayala(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1401년 12월 16일 이전 Sir John Sutton V(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 9월 23일 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 노르섬프턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Constance Blount nasceu aproximadamente 1380, em Barton Blount, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Walter Blount, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Sancha de Ayala, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Sutton V antes 16 de dezembro de 1401. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de setembro de 1432, em Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultada em Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.Dudley Castle, Dudley, West Midlands, En: дудли кастл, дудли, вест мидландс, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Constance Blount родилась около 1380 г. в местности бартон блоунт, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Walter Blount было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Sancha de Ayala, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Sutton V перед 16 декабрь 1401 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 23 сентября 1432 г. в местности нортамптоншир, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности нортамптон, нортамптоншир, Англия.

Se casó con Sir John Sutton V antes de 16 de diciembre de 1401. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 23 de septiembre de 1432, en Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Northampton, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
